title: Water Department Employee Lease Renewal -- 20 West Genesee Street
summary: Michael Layman (Assessment Department) presents item 43, a two-year lease renewal for a water department employee at 20 West Genesee Street with a 5% rate increase.
raw_content:
[01:21:13] >> Um item 43.
[01:21:18] >> Good afternoon, counselors. Michael
[01:21:20] Layman with the assessments department.
[01:21:21] Uh item 43 is we're asking for a renewal
[01:21:24] of a lease uh with a water department
[01:21:27] employee at the um apartment currently
[01:21:30] rented in uh at 20 West Jese Street.
[01:21:33] It's a two-year renewal.
[01:21:37] >> The rate will go up by 5%. Yes.
[01:21:41] >> Well set.
[01:21:42] >> Yep.
[01:21:42] >> All right. Thank you.
[01:21:44] >> Thank you. I also have
